revision.text: <includeonly>{| class="wikitable sortable" {{#ifeq:{{{showorder}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} {{Abbr|No.|Number}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{showseat}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} Seat}} {{#ifeq:{{{showimage}}}|y|! class="unsortable"{{!}}}} {{{image_title|Portrait}}} ! {{{officeholder_title|Name}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtitle}}}|y|!! {{{title|Title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showhome}}}|y|!! {{{home_title|Home}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermstart}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Took office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermend}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Left office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermlenght}}}|y|!! Time in office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showparty}}}|n||!! colspan="{{{party_col|2}}}"{{!}} {{{party_title|Party}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showotherparty}}}|y|!! colspan="2"{{!}} {{{otherparty_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showelection}}}|y|!! {{{election_title|Election}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showconstituency}}}|y|!! Constituency}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showdefencebranch}}}|y|!! {{{defence_branch_title|Defence branch}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showpreviousoffice}}}|y|!! Previous office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showaltofficeholder}}}|y|!! {{{alt_officeholder_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showcoalition}}}|y|!! {{{coalition_title|Coalition}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showcabinet}}}|y|!! {{{cabinet_title|Cabinet}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showref}}}|y|!! {{abbr|Ref.|Reference(s)}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{| class="wikitable sortable" {{#ifeq:{{{showorder}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} {{Abbr|No.|Number}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{showseat}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} Seat}} {{#ifeq:{{{showimage}}}|y|! class="unsortable"{{!}}}} {{{image_title|Portrait}}} ! {{{officeholder_title|Name}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtitle}}}|y|!! {{{title|Title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showhome}}}|y|!! {{{home_title|Home}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermstart}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Took office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermend}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Left office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermlenght}}}|y|!! Time in office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showparty}}}|n||!! colspan="{{{party_col|2}}}"{{!}} {{{party_title|Party}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showotherparty}}}|y|!! colspan="2"{{!}} {{{otherparty_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showelection}}}|y|!! {{{election_title|Election}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showconstituency}}}|y|!! Constituency}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showdefencebranch}}}|y|!! {{{defence_branch_title|Defence branch}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showpreviousoffice}}}|y|!! Previous office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showaltofficeholder}}}|y|!! {{{alt_officeholder_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showcoalition}}}|y|!! {{{coalition_title|Coalition}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showcabinet}}}|y|!! {{{cabinet_title|Cabinet}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showref}}}|y|!! {{abbr|Ref.|Reference(s)}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{| class="wikitable sortable" {{#ifeq:{{{showorder}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} {{Abbr|No.|Number}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{showseat}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} Seat}} {{#ifeq:{{{showimage}}}|y|! class="unsortable"{{!}}}} {{{image_title|Portrait}}} ! {{{officeholder_title|Name}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtitle}}}|y|!! {{{title|Title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showhome}}}|y|!! {{{home_title|Home}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermstart}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Took office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermend}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Left office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermlenght}}}|y|!! Time in office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showparty}}}|n||!! colspan="{{{party_col|2}}}"{{!}} {{{party_title|Party}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showotherparty}}}|y|!! colspan="2"{{!}} {{{otherparty_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showelection}}}|y|!! {{{election_title|Election}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showconstituency}}}|y|!! Constituency}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showdefencebranch}}}|y|!! {{{defence_branch_title|Defence branch}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showpreviousoffice}}}|y|!! Previous office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showaltofficeholder}}}|y|!! {{{alt_officeholder_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showcoalition}}}|y|!! {{{coalition_title|Coalition}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showcabinet}}}|y|!! {{{cabinet_title|Cabinet}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showref}}}|y|!! {{abbr|Ref.|Reference(s)}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{| class="wikitable sortable" {{#ifeq:{{{showorder}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} {{Abbr|No.|Number}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{showseat}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} Seat}} {{#ifeq:{{{showimage}}}|y|! class="unsortable"{{!}}}} {{{image_title|Portrait}}} ! {{{officeholder_title|Name}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtitle}}}|y|!! {{{title|Title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showhome}}}|y|!! {{{home_title|Home}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermstart}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Took office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermend}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Left office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermlenght}}}|y|!! Time in office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showparty}}}|n||!! colspan="{{{party_col|2}}}"{{!}} {{{party_title|Party}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showotherparty}}}|y|!! colspan="2"{{!}} {{{otherparty_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showelection}}}|y|!! {{{election_title|Election}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showconstituency}}}|y|!! <includeonly>{| class="wikitable sortable" {{#ifeq:{{{showorder}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} {{Abbr|No.|Number}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{showseat}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} Seat}} {{#ifeq:{{{showimage}}}|y|! class="unsortable"{{!}}}} {{{image_title|Portrait}}} ! {{{officeholder_title|Name}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtitle}}}|y|!! {{{title|Title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showhome}}}|y|!! {{{home_title|Home}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermstart}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Took office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermend}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Left office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showtermlenght}}}|y|!! Time in office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showparty}}}|n||!! colspan="{{{party_col|2}}}"{{!}} {{{party_title|Party}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showotherparty}}}|y|!! colspan="2"{{!}} {{{otherparty_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showelection}}}|y|!! {{{election_title|Election}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showconstituency}}}|y|!! Constituency}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showdefencebranch}}}|y|!! {{{defence_branch_title|Defence branch}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showpreviousoffice}}}|y|!! Previous office}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showaltofficeholder}}}|y|!! {{{alt_officeholder_title}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showcoalition}}}|y|!! {{{coalition_title|Coalition}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showcabinet}}}|y|!! {{{cabinet_title|Cabinet}}} }}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{showref}}}|y|!! {{abbr|Ref.|Reference(s)}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{| class="wikitable sortable"
{{#ifeq:{{{showorder}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} {{Abbr|No.|Number}}}}
{{#ifeq:{{{showseat}}}|y|! data-sort-type="number"{{!}} Seat}}
{{#ifeq:{{{showimage}}}|y|! class="unsortable"{{!}}}} {{{image_title|Portrait}}}
! {{{officeholder_title|Name}}}{{#ifeq:{{{showtitle}}}|y|!! {{{title|Title}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showhome}}}|y|!! {{{home_title|Home}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showtermstart}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Took office}}{{#ifeq:{{{showtermend}}}|n||!! data-sort-type="date"{{!}} Left office}}{{#ifeq:{{{showtermlenght}}}|y|!! Time in office}}{{#ifeq:{{{showparty}}}|n||!! colspan="{{{party_col|2}}}"{{!}} {{{party_title|Party}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showotherparty}}}|y|!! colspan="2"{{!}} {{{otherparty_title}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showelection}}}|y|!! {{{election_title|Election}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showconstituency}}}|y|!! Constituency}}{{#ifeq:{{{showdefencebranch}}}|y|!! {{{defence_branch_title|Defence branch}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showpreviousoffice}}}|y|!! Previous office}}{{#ifeq:{{{showaltofficeholder}}}|y|!! {{{alt_officeholder_title}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showcoalition}}}|y|!! {{{coalition_title|Coalition}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showcabinet}}}|y|!! {{{cabinet_title|Cabinet}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{showref}}}|y|!! {{abbr|Ref.|Reference(s)}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
